candidates.why: Candidate is a cost line, not revenue.
Candidate is an operating expense line, not revenue.
Candidate is an expense component, not revenue.
Candidate is amortization expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of right of use of assets included in sales and distribution costs
candidates.why: Candidate is depreciation expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list clearly misses the revenue line. Selected 'Net revenue' from the A-column preview as the top-line revenue label. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net revenue

candidates.why: Direct match to COGS and preferred over the subtotal-style total row.
Also represents cost of sales, but is a total/subtotal style row and duplicates 'Cost of goods sold'.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS label rather than the duplicated total row.

candidates.why: Overhead component within sales costs, but narrower than an explicit SG&A line.
Administrative overhead component; valid SG&A bucket.
Explicit SG&A row; preferred anchor for SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A labor component; useful component but narrower than explicit SG&A.
Administrative overhead component.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, so included it plus a broader overhead bucket ('Administration costs') for coverage across years. Excluded depreciation/amortization rows and avoided totals/balancing rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; should be excluded from XRD.
Balance sheet asset rollforward item, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value on the balance sheet, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No current-period R&D expense line is identifiable in the provided statements. Balance-sheet R&D asset lines and amortization of capitalized R&D are not valid XRD.

candidates.why: Best direct match to interest expense.
Narrower lease-interest component; useful fallback if the main interest expense line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, lower priority than reported interest expense lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list, with the direct reported interest expense line first.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Would be acceptable only if no parent/owner-only equity line existed; here it duplicates the parent equity line.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use when a proper equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid any potential double counting with MIB.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line appears in the provided balance sheet. Since owner equity equals total equity in the preview, MIB is treated as absent.
